reason: Successfully sent a message to the QA-20260702-234138-wl02 agent and verified it responded with the correct answer "4" to the math question "What is 2+2?"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully, showing Gamut app with sidebar containing agents
Found and clicked the "QA-20260702-234138-wl02" agent in the sidebar — Successfully navigated to the agent page
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle" (acceptable state)
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message typed and sent successfully, agent entered "working" state
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Response received in approximately 2 seconds

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Agent correctly responded with "4" to the math question. Screenshot shows the complete chat exchange with user message on right ("Hello! What is 2+2?") and agent response in center ("4") with "Worked for 2s" timing indicator
